---
title: "YADES - Monitoring resilience of cultural heritage areas against climate change"
sort_year: 2025
year: "2020 – 2025"
status: "Past"
funder: "H2020-MSCA-RISE-2019"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Past]
---

**Year:** 2020 – 2025
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** H2020-MSCA-RISE-2019
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
